title: SY6 6AX, Agilent Technologies LDA UK Limited: environmental permit application advertisement – EPR/KP3320LH/A001
body: "The Environment Agency consults the public on certain applications for:  *installations  The arrangements are explained in their Public Participation Statement  These notices explain:   what the application is about how to view and comment on the proposed variation when you need to comment by   The Environment Agency will decide:  *whether to grant or refuse the application  *what conditions to include in the permit (if granted) "
